title: Random Crafting Recipes
description: Every Crafting Recipe is randomized. You will no longer get vanilla Recipes
body:
# Random Crafting Recipe Mod
Every Recipe you know is randomized. ONLY the recipe, that means the Item count is still the same. One log can give you still 4 items, but it doesn't need to be planks. It can be 4 bedrock or 4 dirt blocks and so on.

## Saving
Mod should save the randomized Recipes in your current World. So every World has different Recipes.
It can obviously happen that a recipe can be randomized and has the same Item it has in vanilla. This isn't a bug, I keep it in the mod and this won't be changed.

## Known Bug
This bug will only appear in versions before 1.21.3. With the beginning of 1.21.3 every version of this Mod won't have it anymore!
When you use the recipe book to autofill the crafting grid, the recipe will show a different item than you actually get out of it. 
You get the same randomized Item like when you put the Items yourself in the grid, just the preview of the Item you get is wrong.

### Actual Item
![Actual item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02d792c7f96c0a59c81856cbfc8afc9356ccd153.png)

### Wrong Showcased Item
![Wrong Item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a3120c6eb6ca01d6463054b246f331f7654b28e.png)
